title: Fix slice memory overflow on large output arrays
body:
The `const int elements = arrayp->rangep()->elementsConst()` may be arbitrarily large as it is taken from the array size of the Verilog declaration, and can create arbitrarily many `AstNodeAssign` until the memory is full.

Version: v5.042

This problem can be reproduced by using `output logic port[<a-rather-large-number>]` as a module output port.

Example log (`--debugi 9`) when `INST_MEM_SIZE = 4096 * 1024`
```
- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new -  ASSIGNW 0x2e14140 <e1180871#> {o9at} @dt=0x1189ad0@(G/w8)
- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new -      This=ASSIGNW 0x2e14140 back=0 headtail=this op1p=0x2e13c20 op2p=0x2e13eb0
- V3FileLine.cpp:193: Get Stream[ct30+59]:     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
__WARNBEGIN__    9 |     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
      |                   ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~
__WARNEND__- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new - 1: ARRAYSEL 0x2e13c20 <e1180869#> {o9at} @dt=0x1189ad0@(G/w8)
- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new - 1:     This=ARRAYSEL 0x2e13c20 back=0x2e14140 headtail=this op1p=0x2e13cd0 op2p=0x2e13db0
- V3FileLine.cpp:193: Get Stream[ct30+59]:     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
__WARNBEGIN__    9 |     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
      |                   ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~
__WARNEND__- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new - 1:1: VARREF 0x2e13cd0 <e1180857#> {o9at} @dt=0x17c7c60@(w8)u[0:4194303]  tb_datapath__DOT__DEBUG_inst_mem [RV] <- VARSCOPE 0x18c94a0 <e800848> {u44am} @dt=0x17c7c60@(w8)u[0:4194303]  TOP->tb_datapath__DOT__DEBUG_inst_mem [T] [scopep=0x18a51f0] -> VAR 0x1514950 <e200929> {u44am} @dt=0x17c7c60@(w8)u[0:4194303]  tb_datapath__DOT__DEBUG_inst_mem [VSTATICI]  VAR
- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new - 1:1:     This=VARREF 0x2e13cd0 back=0x2e13c20 headtail=this
- V3FileLine.cpp:193: Get Stream[ct30+59]:     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
__WARNBEGIN__    9 |     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
      |                   ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~
__WARNEND__- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new - 1:2: CONST 0x2e13db0 <e1180858#> {o9at} @dt=0x1186380@(G/w32)  32'h3870
- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new - 1:2:     This=CONST 0x2e13db0 back=0x2e13c20 headtail=this
- V3FileLine.cpp:193: Get Stream[ct30+59]:     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
__WARNBEGIN__    9 |     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
      |                   ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~
__WARNEND__- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new - 2: ARRAYSEL 0x2e13eb0 <e1180870#> {o9at} @dt=0x1189ad0@(G/w8)
- V3Slice.cpp:275:    new - 2:     This=ARRAYSEL 0x2e13eb0 back=0x2e14140 headtail=this op1p=0x2e13f60 op2p=0x2e14040
- V3FileLine.cpp:193: Get Stream[ct30+59]:     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
__WARNBEGIN__    9 |     output byte_t DEBUG_inst_mem[INST_MEM_SIZE],
      |                   ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```
